intent: 退役 Fabric co-location/agents.meta:doctor+十几个工具全读 store、agents.meta 退役、install 不建空柜子;并补 doctor 三类 scope lint + re-scope/promote 工具;最终全量 tsc+测试绿收口
goal: 把父 ledger 20260604-multistore-scope-decolo 的 4 扇 deferred 门(G-DECOLO/G-INSTALL/G-GUARD/G-GREEN)全部收绿:agents.meta co-location 派生柜全面退役,doctor 与十几个内部工具改读 store,install 不再建空柜子,doctor 增三类 scope lint + re-scope/promote 工具,最后 shared rebuild + 全量 tsc + 全测试绿。

in_scope: doctor(server+cli)改读 store 替代 co-location agents.meta
十几个内部工具(读 agents.meta 派生态的非测试生产读者)改读 store
agents.meta.json 退役:零生产读者(测试/迁移 shim 除外)+ install/uninstall 不再写它
install 不再给新项目建 co-location 空柜子(.fabric/agents.meta.json + 空 knowledge 柜)
doctor 增三类 scope lint:缺 semantic_scope / personal 泄露进 team store / dangling project 引用
批量 re-scope + promotion(project→team 通用吸收)工具
收口:shared rebuild dist + 全量 tsc --noEmit 绿 + 全测试 0 fail + 删旧柜子验证
out_of_scope: W1–W3 已 ship 的写入落 scope / recall project 过滤 / resolveCandidates 排序 / scope-backfill — 不重做
新知识检索算法 / 向量召回 / 新功能
非 store 相关的无关 refactor 或 UI
server-http-experimental 的功能扩展(仅必要时跟随 agents.meta 退役改其读取)
constraints: clean-slate:Fabric 零用户阶段,不保留/不迁移 legacy co-location 数据(feedback-clean-slate)
改 packages/shared/src/schemas/ 后必须 pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-shared build 重建 dist(shared-rebuild-on-schema-change),否则 runtime invalid_union_discriminator
收口前必须本地跑 pnpm typecheck(= pnpm -r exec tsc --noEmit),不能只靠 build(local-tsc-vs-ci-tsc,已三次复发)
退役顺序:先 B1/B2 把所有读者切到 store,再 B3 删 agents.meta 柜 —— 不能在仍有读者时删柜
agents.meta 零读者门排除:*.test.ts 测试 + 明确标注的 migration/compat shim(若需保留)
per-session 信号保持 session-scoped(用户多窗口并发同 repo,user-multiwindow-concurrent-dev)

ship_criteria.name: G-DECOLO
ship_criteria.target: agents.meta.json 零生产读者(测试/迁移 shim 除外)+ doctor/十几个工具全读 store
ship_criteria.actual: PARTIAL — counter 侧 GREEN(B3a/b/F1: counter 迁 per-store counters.json + review.ts 铸号重定向 + F1 撞号修);读侧 cutover(B3c/B1/B2: load-active-meta/plan-context/doctor 等 ~18 consumer 去 co-location nodes)DEFERRED→新 goal 统一收尾
ship_criteria.verifier_cmd: grep -rl 'agents\.meta\|agentsMeta\|readAgentsMeta' packages/*/src --include='*.ts' | grep -v '\.test\.ts' | grep -v 'agents-meta.ts'  # 期望仅剩 schema 定义/shim,生产读者=0

ship_criteria.name: G-INSTALL
ship_criteria.target: install 不再给新项目建 co-location 空柜子(无 agents.meta.json + 无空 knowledge 柜)
ship_criteria.actual: DEFERRED→新 goal(耦合读侧 cutover:消费者仍读 agents.meta 时不能停 scaffold)
ship_criteria.verifier_cmd: PROBE:install 流程测试断言不 scaffold agents.meta.json/空柜 —— 首轮探测 packages/cli install 测试(install.test.ts / run-global-install)定真实断言命令

ship_criteria.name: G-GUARD
ship_criteria.target: doctor 三类 scope lint 生效 + re-scope/promote 工具可用
ship_criteria.actual: GREEN — A6: doctor-scope-lint 三类(missing_scope_fields/personal_leak_in_shared_store→error/dangling_project_ref)接入默认报告+i18n,doctor-scope-lint 6 测试(commit cd72b04);A7: store re-scope/promote 工具(R5#3+dangling 守护),store-rescope 7 测试(commit 1b89a5e);server 834+cli 986+全量 tsc 绿
ship_criteria.verifier_cmd: pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-server test -- doctor-scope-lint && pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-cli test -- store-rescope

ship_criteria.name: G-GREEN
ship_criteria.target: shared rebuild dist + 全量 tsc --noEmit 绿 + 全测试 0 fail
ship_criteria.actual: 本轮增量 GREEN(每 commit 后全量 tsc + shared 579/server 834/cli 986 全过 + dist 重建);完整 9/9 收口 DEFERRED→新 goal(随读侧 cutover)
ship_criteria.verifier_cmd: pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-shared build && pnpm typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present test

findings.expectation_source: store-migrate(producer)写入的 store id 空间 与 store-counters allocateStoreKnowledgeId(consumer)读的 counters.json 必须一致
findings.actual: store-migrate.ts buildStoreIdIndex 用 disk-max 重映射碰撞,但迁后不写 counters.json;新 allocateStoreKnowledgeId 从 counters.json(迁后仍=0)铸号 → 迁入 KT-DEC-0001..N 后下次运行时铸 KT-DEC-0001 撞号。两条 id 路径(迁移 disk-max vs 运行时 counters.json)未对账。

verify.evidence: store-migrate.ts:141-178 nextId/buildStoreIdIndex 只 disk-max,无 counters.json 写;store-counters.ts allocate 只读 counters.json

findings.fix_evidence: store-counters.reconcileStoreCounters(disk-max floor,永不下调)+ store-migrate 迁后 seed counters.json;store-counters +3 测试(含 F1 producer→consumer round-trip);shared 579+cli 979+server 828 全过;commit 5a3945d

task_decomposition.done_when: doctor 所有 check 从 store(~/.fabric/stores/ via global-config-io/store-resolver)取知识与派生态,不再 readAgentsMeta;doctor 全测试绿

task_decomposition.subject: agents.meta.json 旧空柜子退役:install/uninstall 不再写它,meta-reader/cache 派生态源切 store,删 agents.meta 生成/同步链路
task_decomposition.done_when: 无任何生产代码写/读 .fabric/agents.meta.json(测试/shim 除外);G-DECOLO grep gate 通过

verification.evidence: store-counters.ts(committed counters.json, file-lock R-M-W)+schema STORE_LAYOUT.countersFile+barrel export;store-counters.test.ts 8/8(零默认/单调/per-layer-type/删后不重用/并发锁distinct/corrupt降级/round-trip);shared tsc clean;全 shared 576 通过(+8)

task_decomposition.subject: review.ts allocator 重定向到 write-target store 的 counters.json(传 storeDir 而非 projectRoot/.fabric/agents.meta.json)
task_decomposition.done_when: review approve 铸新 id 时 counter 落 write-target store 的 counters.json;review 测试绿;不再 new KnowledgeIdAllocator(projectRoot...)

verification.evidence: review.ts approve+layer-flip 两处铸号改 allocateStoreKnowledgeId(layer,type,resolveWriteTargetStoreDir(layer));导出 cross-store-write.resolveWriteTargetStoreDir;删 KnowledgeIdAllocator import+allocator 参数串。emergent(内联吸收):review.test+fab-review.test 2 断言从 co-location agents.meta 改向 store counters.json(加 storeCountersFile helper)。全量 tsc 绿+server 828/828+shared 576。commit b8d93f8

task_decomposition.subject: 彻底删 co-location agents.meta 读/写:meta-reader 退役或 shim;cache watch 改 store;doctor index-drift/counter-reconcile 重定向 per-store;plan-context 读源去掉 meta.nodes co-location 只留 cross-store;【F1 修复】store-counters 加 reconcileStoreCounters(disk-max floor)+ store-migrate 迁后 seed counters.json

needs_adjudication.subject: counter 新家 = per-store committed counters.json(我的默认决策,已执行)
needs_adjudication.detail: 退役 co-location agents.meta 后 stable_id 单调 counter 需新家。决策:迁为 per-store committed counters.json(随 store clone 旅行防重号)。代价:团队 store 多人并发铸号→counters.json git 冲突(解=merge 取 max,doctor --fix 可愈)。备选:(a)per-store gitignored agents.meta 仅存 counter(personal 够用但 team clone 丢 counter 重号);(b)disk-max+1 不持久化(删最高 id 会重用→破坏 cite 历史,已排除)。clean-slate 零用户期我判可接受,round 末请否决/确认。
needs_adjudication.resolution: 用户 2026-06-04 采纳推荐方案:保留 per-store committed counters.json(DEC-counter-home 确认)。git 冲突取 max 由 reconcileStoreCounters/doctor 兜底。

decisions.decision: counter 迁为 per-store committed counters.json(复用 AgentsMetaCountersSchema {KP,KT} envelope)
decisions.rationale: 单调正确性需持久化(KT-DEC-0004);须随 store clone 旅行(同 projects.json);disk-derive 破坏 cite 历史已排除

decisions.decision: 先做独立门 G-GUARD(A6 三类 scope lint + A7 re-scope/promote);读侧 cutover(G-DECOLO 读侧 + G-INSTALL)+ dogfood 22 条 store migrate 数据迁移 留到单独确认步
decisions.rationale: 用户拍板(AskUserQuestion):读侧是耦合核心读路径大改 + 动用户 KB 数据(难撤销),G-GUARD 只读 store frontmatter 相对独立可逐步绿。稳、可审、每步绿。

round_sequence: [需确认] 读侧 cutover W4-B3c/B1/B2 + dogfood store migrate

store migrate 迁后 reconcileStoreCounters seed counters.json 防运行时撞号(producer↔consumer 缺口)
G-GUARD doctor 三类 store scope lint(missing/personal-leak/dangling-project)+ i18n + 接入默认报告
G-GUARD re-scope/promote 工具(store CLI 子命令,R5#3+dangling 守护)→ G-GUARD 门绿

loop_exit_status.terminate_reason: user-decision: G-GUARD 门绿 + counter 子系统(G-DECOLO counter 侧)已交付;读侧 cutover(G-DECOLO 读侧 + G-INSTALL + G-GREEN)耦合大改 + 动 dogfood KB 数据,用户决定新起 goal 在其他轮次统一收尾
loop_exit_status.summary: 5 commit 全绿(b8d93f8 counter迁per-store + 5a3945d F1撞号修 + cd72b04 doctor三类scope-lint + 1b89a5e re-scope/promote)。门: G-GUARD ✅全绿; G-DECOLO 🟡counter侧done读侧deferred; G-INSTALL/G-GREEN deferred。27新测试 shared579/server834/cli986全过 全量tsc绿。2条知识归档team store pending。待裁决 ADJ-1(counter-home committed counters.json)未否决=保留。
